If at the time of the arrival of the cattle in the evening, there
be a bull or a black animal (such as a goat) in front, there would be
copious rains in the year; if it be black and white, rains would be
moderate; and if it be white, there would be no rain at all. A pro-
portionate estimate of the quantity of rain is to be made with the
animals of other colours.
[It is to be remembered that the prognostication referred to in
this verse should be made under the circumstances mentioned in the
beginning of this chapter and the previous one too.
